model_requirements.description: water utilities industry enterprise data model.

_vibe_session_metadata.summary: Model quality: 97.0/100 (15 warnings, 0 errors). 79 tables across 9 domains.

model.name: Water_Utilities
model.description: water utilities industry enterprise data model.

domains.name: treatment
domains.description: Authoritative domain for all water treatment and purification operations at WTPs and WWTPs. Owns process data for coagulation, filtration, disinfection (UV, chlorination, RO, UF, MF, GAC), CT compliance, chemical dosing, and finished water production. Integrates with SCADA/OSIsoft PI Historian for real-time process control and MOR regulatory submissions.

domains.name: customer
domains.description: Single source of truth for all water and wastewater service accounts including residential, commercial, industrial, and municipal customers. Manages customer profiles, service addresses, account hierarchies, customer segments, contact information, service agreements, and customer lifecycle from application through termination. SSOT for customer identity across all billing, metering, and service delivery systems.

products.name: customer_account
products.description: Master record for every water and wastewater service account — residential, commercial, industrial, and municipal. Serves as the SSOT for customer identity across Oracle CC&B, SAP, AMI, and all downstream systems. Captures account number, account type (residential/commercial/industrial/municipal), account status (active/inactive/pending/suspended/terminated), service class, credit rating, account open date, account close date, language preference, paperless billing flag, autopay enrollment, lifecycle stage, and water budget allocation (where applicable). This is the primary anchor entity for the customer domain — all billing, metering, service delivery, and regulatory reporting references flow through this entity.
products.reference: Oracle CC&B Account / CIS Account

attributes.name: customer_account_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the customer_account data product (auto-inserted pre-linking).

attributes.name: organization_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.organization. Business justification: Commercial and industrial customer accounts should reference the organization master record. This allows proper tracking of corporate account structures. The account table currently only has person_id

attributes.name: wtp_facility_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to treatment.facility. Business justification: Multi-facility utilities must track which WTP serves each account for facility-specific CCR distribution, water quality inquiry routing, source water reporting on bills, and facility maintenance notif

products.name: person
products.description: Master record for individual persons associated with water utility accounts — account holders, co-applicants, authorized contacts, and guarantors. Captures legal name, date of birth, government ID type and masked number, primary phone, secondary phone, email address, preferred contact method, language preference, identity verification status, and privacy consent flags. Distinct from the account entity: one person may hold multiple accounts (e.g., landlord with multiple rental properties). SSOT for individual identity within the customer domain.
products.reference: Oracle CC&B Person / CIS Person

attributes.name: person_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the person record. Primary key for the person entity. Serves as the single source of truth for individual identity within the customer domain.

attributes.name: service_address_id
attributes.description: FK to service address

attributes.name: autopay_enrollment_date
attributes.description: The date when the person enrolled in or opted out of autopay in yyyy-MM-dd format. Used for payment preference tracking and billing operations.

attributes.name: autopay_enrollment_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the person has enrolled in automatic payment (autopay) for their utility bills. True if enrolled in autopay, False otherwise. Used for payment processing and customer convenience tracking.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this person record was first created in the system in yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX format. Used for audit trails, data lineage, and record lifecycle tracking.

attributes.name: credit_check_consent_date
attributes.description: The date when the person provided consent for credit check in yyyy-MM-dd format. Used for compliance documentation and audit trails.

attributes.name: credit_check_consent_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the person has provided consent for the utility to perform a credit check. True if consent given, False otherwise. Required for deposit determination and account establishment.

attributes.name: customer_segment
attributes.description: The business segment classification of the person based on their primary account relationship. Used for rate classification, service level determination, and customer analytics. Aligns with rate schedule eligibility.

attributes.name: data_sharing_consent_date
attributes.description: The date when the person provided or withdrew data sharing consent in yyyy-MM-dd format. Used for compliance documentation and privacy management.

attributes.name: data_sharing_consent_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the person has consented to sharing their data with third parties (e.g., energy efficiency program partners, government agencies, research organizations). True if consent given, False otherwise.

attributes.name: date_of_birth
attributes.description: The person's date of birth in yyyy-MM-dd format. Used for identity verification, age-based service eligibility (e.g., senior citizen rates), and compliance with age-restricted service programs.

attributes.name: disability_accommodation_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the person requires disability accommodations for service delivery, communications, or billing. True if accommodations required, False otherwise. Used to ensure accessible service delivery.

attributes.name: disability_accommodation_notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes describing specific disability accommodations required by the person (e.g., large print bills, TTY/TDD phone service, accessible meter location). Used to ensure appropriate service delivery and ADA compliance.

attributes.name: email_address
attributes.description: The primary email address for the person. Used for electronic billing, service notifications, CCR (Consumer Confidence Report) delivery, and digital customer communications.

attributes.name: government_id_expiration_date
attributes.description: The expiration date of the government-issued identification document in yyyy-MM-dd format. Used to ensure identity verification documents remain current and valid.

attributes.name: government_id_issuing_state
attributes.description: The U.S. state or territory that issued the government identification document. Used for identity verification and fraud prevention. Two-letter state abbreviation (e.g., CA, NY, TX).

attributes.name: government_id_number_masked
attributes.description: The masked or partially redacted government-issued identification number (e.g., last 4 digits of SSN, masked driver's license number). Full number stored in secure vault; this field contains display-safe version for operational use.

attributes.name: government_id_type
attributes.description: The type of government-issued identification document provided by the person for identity verification during account application or service connection. Used to comply with customer identification requirements.

attributes.name: identity_verification_date
attributes.description: The date when the person's identity was successfully verified in yyyy-MM-dd format. Used for audit trails and compliance reporting on customer identification procedures.

attributes.name: identity_verification_method
attributes.description: The method used to verify the person's identity (in-person document review, online verification service, mail-in documentation, third-party identity verification service). Used for audit and compliance tracking.

attributes.name: identity_verification_status
attributes.description: The current status of the person's identity verification process. Indicates whether government-issued identification has been validated and approved for service connection and account establishment.

attributes.name: language_preference
attributes.description: The person's preferred language for communications and service delivery. Three-letter ISO 639-2 language code. Used to ensure accessible customer service and compliance with language access requirements. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: ENG|SPA|CHI|VIE|KOR|RUS|FRE|ARA|POR|OTH — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: The timestamp when this person record was last updated in yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX format. Used for audit trails, change tracking, and data synchronization across systems.

attributes.name: legal_first_name
attributes.description: The legal first name of the person as it appears on government-issued identification documents. Used for identity verification and legal correspondence.

attributes.name: legal_last_name
attributes.description: The legal last name (surname) of the person as it appears on government-issued identification documents. Used for identity verification and legal correspondence.

attributes.name: legal_middle_name
attributes.description: The legal middle name or initial of the person as it appears on government-issued identification documents. May be null if not provided.

attributes.name: life_support_equipment_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the person or household member relies on life-support medical equipment that requires uninterrupted water service. True if life-support equipment present, False otherwise. Used for service disconnection protection and emergency prioritization.

attributes.name: life_support_verification_date
attributes.description: The date when the life-support equipment status was verified by medical certification in yyyy-MM-dd format. Used for program compliance and annual recertification tracking.

attributes.name: low_income_assistance_eligible_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the person is eligible for low-income assistance programs, rate discounts, or payment assistance based on income verification. True if eligible, False otherwise. Used for social equity program administration.

attributes.name: low_income_verification_date
attributes.description: The date when the person's low-income status was verified for assistance program eligibility in yyyy-MM-dd format. Used for program compliance and recertification tracking.

attributes.name: marketing_consent_date
attributes.description: The date when the person provided or withdrew marketing consent in yyyy-MM-dd format. Used for compliance documentation and preference management.

attributes.name: marketing_consent_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the person has consented to receive marketing communications and promotional materials from the utility. True if consent given, False otherwise. Used to comply with marketing communication regulations.

attributes.name: paperless_billing_enrollment_date
attributes.description: The date when the person enrolled in or opted out of paperless billing in yyyy-MM-dd format. Used for billing preference tracking and environmental impact reporting.

attributes.name: paperless_billing_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the person has enrolled in paperless billing and prefers to receive bills electronically. True if enrolled in paperless billing, False if paper bills preferred.

attributes.name: person_status
attributes.description: The current lifecycle status of the person record. Active indicates the person is currently associated with one or more accounts. Inactive indicates no current account relationships. Deceased, merged, and duplicate statuses support data quality and master data management.

attributes.name: person_type
attributes.description: The role or relationship type of the person within the customer domain. Distinguishes between account holders, co-applicants, authorized contacts, guarantors, and other person roles. One person may have multiple types across different accounts.

attributes.name: preferred_contact_method
attributes.description: The person's preferred method for receiving utility communications and notifications. Used to honor customer communication preferences and improve engagement rates.

attributes.name: preferred_name
attributes.description: The name the person prefers to be called in day-to-day interactions, which may differ from their legal name. Used for customer service communications and personalization.

attributes.name: primary_phone
attributes.description: The primary contact phone number for the person. Used for service notifications, billing inquiries, outage alerts, and emergency communications. Format may include country code, area code, and extension.

attributes.name: primary_phone_type
attributes.description: The type of primary phone number (mobile, home, work, other). Used to determine appropriate communication channels and times for customer outreach.

attributes.name: senior_citizen_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the person qualifies as a senior citizen for age-based rate discounts or service programs. True if senior citizen, False otherwise. Age threshold defined by utility policy and regulatory requirements.

attributes.name: suffix
attributes.description: Generational or professional suffix appended to the person's legal name (e.g., Jr, Sr, II, III). Used to distinguish individuals with identical names.

products.name: organization
products.description: Master record for commercial, industrial, and municipal organizations that hold water and wastewater service accounts. Captures legal entity name, DBA name, federal tax ID (EIN), NAICS/SIC industry code, organization type (corporation/LLC/municipality/HOA/government), primary contact name, incorporation state, credit tier, industrial user classification (for IUP purposes), and parent organization reference for corporate hierarchies. Supports B2B account management and industrial pretreatment program tracking.
products.reference: Oracle CC&B Business Entity / Industrial User

attributes.name: organization_id
attributes.description: Unique system identifier for the organization entity. Primary key for commercial, industrial, and municipal organizations holding water and wastewater service accounts.

attributes.name: compliance_permit_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_permit. Business justification: Industrial pretreatment program management: organizations subject to IUP permits must be linked to their compliance_permit record. organization already carries denormalized iup_permit_number and iup_e

attributes.name: parent_organization_id
attributes.description: Reference to the parent organization in corporate hierarchies. Enables consolidated billing, enterprise account management, and multi-location reporting for corporate customers.

attributes.name: wwtp_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to wastewater.wwtp. Business justification: Industrial users (organization.industrial_user_flag=true) discharge to the sewer system under EPA 40 CFR Part 403 industrial pretreatment programs. Tracking which WWTP receives each industrial user's

attributes.name: account_closed_date
attributes.description: Date when the organization's account was closed or terminated. Null for active accounts.

attributes.name: account_opened_date
attributes.description: Date when the organization's first service account was established with the utility. Used for customer tenure analysis and loyalty program eligibility.

attributes.name: account_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the organization account. Active accounts receive service; Suspended accounts have service restrictions; Closed accounts are terminated.

attributes.name: annual_revenue_range
attributes.description: Estimated annual revenue range of the organization. Used for credit assessment, account prioritization, and business development targeting.

attributes.name: auto_pay_enrolled_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the organization is enrolled in automatic payment processing. True if enrolled, False otherwise.

attributes.name: billing_address_line1
attributes.description: First line of the organization's billing address, typically street number and name. Used for invoice delivery and legal correspondence.

attributes.name: billing_address_line2
attributes.description: Second line of billing address for suite, floor, or department information.

attributes.name: billing_city
attributes.description: City name for the organization's billing address.

attributes.name: billing_country
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code for the organization's billing address.

attributes.name: billing_postal_code
attributes.description: ZIP or ZIP+4 postal code for the organization's billing address.

attributes.name: billing_state
attributes.description: Two-letter state code for the organization's billing address.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: System timestamp when the organization record was first created in the customer information system.

attributes.name: credit_limit_amount
attributes.description: Maximum outstanding balance allowed for the organization before service restrictions are applied. Expressed in USD.

attributes.name: credit_tier
attributes.description: Internal credit rating tier assigned to the organization based on payment history, financial strength, and risk assessment. Determines deposit requirements and payment terms.

attributes.name: customer_segment
attributes.description: Business segment classification for the organization. Used for rate structure assignment, service level agreements, and market analysis.

attributes.name: dba_name
attributes.description: Trade name or fictitious business name under which the organization operates, if different from legal name. Used for customer-facing communications and service delivery.

attributes.name: deposit_amount
attributes.description: Dollar amount of security deposit held for the organization. Expressed in USD. Null if no deposit is required.

attributes.name: deposit_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether a security deposit is required for this organization based on credit assessment. True if deposit is required, False otherwise.

attributes.name: employee_count_range
attributes.description: Estimated number of employees at the organization. Used for water demand forecasting and commercial rate structure assignment. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: 1_to_10|11_to_50|51_to_200|201_to_500|501_to_1000|over_1000|unknown — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: federal_tax_number
attributes.description: IRS-issued Employer Identification Number (EIN) for tax reporting and identification purposes. Nine-digit number in format XX-XXXXXXX.

attributes.name: incorporation_date
attributes.description: Date the organization was legally incorporated, registered, or chartered. Used for account tenure analysis and credit assessment.

attributes.name: incorporation_state
attributes.description: Two-letter state code where the organization is legally incorporated or registered. Used for jurisdictional compliance and legal correspondence.

attributes.name: industrial_user_classification
attributes.description: EPA classification level for industrial users subject to pretreatment requirements. Categorical Industrial User (CIU) discharges regulated pollutants; Significant Industrial User (SIU) meets discharge thresholds; Non-Significant does not meet thresholds.

attributes.name: industrial_user_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the organization is classified as an industrial user subject to pretreatment program requirements under the Clean Water Act. True if industrial user, False otherwise.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: System timestamp when the organization record was last updated. Used for data synchronization and audit trail.

attributes.name: legal_name
attributes.description: The official registered legal name of the organization as filed with state incorporation documents or municipal charter. Used for contracts, billing, and regulatory reporting.

attributes.name: naics_code
attributes.business_glossary_term: North American Industry Classification System (NAICS) Code
attributes.description: Six-digit NAICS code identifying the organization's primary industry sector. Used for industrial user classification, rate structure assignment, and regulatory reporting.

tag_set.value: North American Industry Classification System (NAICS) Code

attributes.name: organization_type
attributes.description: Legal structure classification of the organization. Determines billing rules, credit policies, and regulatory treatment.

attributes.name: paperless_billing_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the organization has opted for electronic billing only. True if paperless, False if paper invoices are required.

attributes.name: payment_terms_days
attributes.description: Number of days allowed for payment after invoice date. Standard terms are typically 30 days; extended terms may be granted based on credit tier.

attributes.name: primary_contact_email
attributes.description: Email address of the primary contact for electronic billing, service notifications, and account correspondence.

attributes.name: primary_contact_name
attributes.description: Full name of the primary authorized representative or contact person for the organization. Used for account management, billing inquiries, and service notifications.

attributes.name: primary_contact_phone
attributes.description: Primary telephone number for reaching the organization contact. Used for urgent service notifications, outage alerts, and account inquiries.

attributes.name: primary_contact_title
attributes.description: Job title or role of the primary contact person within the organization (e.g., Facilities Manager, CFO, City Manager).

attributes.name: sic_code
attributes.description: Four-digit SIC code for legacy industry classification. Maintained for historical reporting and systems that have not migrated to NAICS.

attributes.name: special_billing_instructions
attributes.description: Free-text field for custom billing requirements, invoice formatting preferences, or special handling instructions for the organization account.

attributes.name: tax_exempt_certificate_number
attributes.description: State-issued tax exemption certificate number for organizations claiming tax-exempt status. Required for audit compliance.

attributes.name: tax_exempt_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the organization is exempt from sales tax or utility taxes. True if tax-exempt (typically government entities), False otherwise.

attributes.name: website_url
attributes.description: Public website URL for the organization. Used for customer research and business development.

products.name: service_address
products.description: Physical location where water and/or wastewater service is delivered. Captures full street address, city, state, ZIP+4, county, parcel number (APN), GIS coordinates (latitude/longitude), service territory code, pressure zone, DMA (District Metered Area) code, sewer basin, flood zone designation, address validation status, and whether the address is within the utility service boundary. Linked to the distribution network and metering domains via service point. One address may have multiple active accounts over time (tenant turnover).
products.reference: Oracle CC&B Premise / Service Point Address

attributes.name: service_address_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the service address record. Primary key for the service address entity.

attributes.name: dma_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to distribution.dma. Business justification: Service addresses fall within District Metered Areas for non-revenue water tracking, leak detection program management, and consumption pattern analysis. Essential for AWWA water audit compliance, tar

attributes.name: sewershed_basin_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to wastewater.sewershed_basin. Business justification: service_address.sewer_basin is a denormalized text representation of the sewershed_basin entity. SSO notifications, wastewater billing, and regulatory capacity reporting require a proper FK. sewer_bas

attributes.name: water_system_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to quality.water_system. Business justification: Each service address is served by a specific public water system (PWS). This link is required for CCR delivery targeting, LCRR compliance site classification, and regulatory reporting — all of which r

attributes.name: address_effective_date
attributes.description: Date when this service address became effective and available for service delivery. Start of the address lifecycle.

attributes.name: address_end_date
attributes.description: Date when this service address was retired or became unavailable for service. Null if address is still active.

attributes.name: address_line_1
attributes.description: Primary street address line including house number, street name, and street type. First line of the physical service delivery location.

attributes.name: address_line_2
attributes.description: Secondary address line for apartment number, suite, unit, building, floor, or other location qualifier within the premise.

attributes.name: address_notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes or comments about the service address including special access instructions, delivery restrictions, or historical context.

attributes.name: address_source_system
attributes.description: Name of the source system or application that created or last updated this service address record (e.g., CC&B, GIS, CRM).

attributes.name: address_status
attributes.description: Lifecycle status of the service address record. Values: active (currently serviceable), inactive (temporarily not in use), pending (awaiting activation), retired (permanently closed).

attributes.name: address_validation_status
attributes.description: Status indicating whether the address has been validated against USPS or other authoritative address databases. Values: validated, unvalidated, corrected, invalid.

attributes.name: apn
attributes.description: County assessor parcel number uniquely identifying the land parcel for property tax and ownership purposes. Links service address to GIS parcel data.

attributes.name: building_type
attributes.description: Type or classification of building structure at the service address (e.g., single-family, multi-family, office, retail, warehouse, school).

attributes.name: city
attributes.description: City or municipality name where the service address is located.

attributes.name: country_code
attributes.description: Three-letter ISO country code for the service address (e.g., USA, CAN, MEX).

attributes.name: county
attributes.description: County or parish name where the service address is located. Used for regulatory reporting and jurisdictional compliance.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this service address record was first created in the system. Audit trail for data lineage.

attributes.name: customer_class
attributes.description: Customer classification for rate and billing purposes. Values: residential, commercial, industrial, municipal, agricultural, institutional.

attributes.name: flood_zone_designation
attributes.description: FEMA flood zone classification (e.g., A, AE, X, VE) indicating flood risk level. Used for infrastructure planning and emergency response.

attributes.name: gis_feature_code
attributes.description: Unique identifier linking this service address to the corresponding feature in the Esri ArcGIS spatial database for network modeling and asset management.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this service address record was last updated or modified. Audit trail for change tracking.

attributes.name: latitude
attributes.description: Geographic latitude coordinate in decimal degrees (WGS84 datum). Used for GIS mapping, network modeling, and spatial analysis.

attributes.name: longitude
attributes.description: Geographic longitude coordinate in decimal degrees (WGS84 datum). Used for GIS mapping, network modeling, and spatial analysis.

attributes.name: meter_location_description
attributes.description: Free-text description of where the water meter is physically located at the premise (e.g., front yard, basement, alley, inside garage).

attributes.name: occupancy_status
attributes.description: Current occupancy status of the premise. Values: occupied, vacant, seasonal, under_construction.

attributes.name: postal_code
attributes.description: Five-digit ZIP code or ZIP+4 format postal code for the service address. Used for mail delivery and geographic segmentation.

attributes.name: pressure_zone
attributes.description: Water distribution pressure zone identifier indicating the hydraulic zone serving this address. Used for hydraulic modeling and pressure management.

attributes.name: service_territory_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the utility service territory or franchise area where the address is located. Determines regulatory jurisdiction and service provider.

attributes.name: service_type
attributes.description: Type of utility service(s) available at this address. Values: water_only, wastewater_only, water_and_wastewater, stormwater, reclaimed_water.

attributes.name: standardized_address
attributes.description: Fully standardized and concatenated address string following USPS formatting rules. Used for address matching and deduplication.

attributes.name: state_code
attributes.description: Two-letter state or province abbreviation following USPS standards (e.g., CA, TX, NY).

attributes.name: within_service_boundary_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the address is within the utility's authorized service boundary. True if within boundary, False if outside.

products.name: premise
products.description: The physical property or facility at which utility service is provided, representing the utility's view of a serviceable location independent of the customer occupying it. Captures premise type (single-family residential, multi-family, commercial, industrial, irrigation, fire protection), lot size, building type, number of units (for multi-family), number of fixture units (for capacity planning), zoning classification, construction year, lead service line status (known lead, galvanized requiring replacement, non-lead, unknown — per LCRR inventory), and whether the premise is subject to low-income assistance programs. Bridges the customer domain to the distribution network and metering domains. Distinct from service_address: a premise is the utility's asset record for the location; service_address is the postal/GIS record.
products.reference: Oracle CC&B Premise

attributes.name: premise_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the premise record. Primary key representing the utility's asset record for a serviceable location.

attributes.name: connected_pipe_main_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to distribution.pipe_main. Business justification: Premises physically connect to specific distribution mains for water service delivery. Essential for hydraulic modeling, service line inventory (LCRR compliance), outage impact analysis, and main brea

attributes.name: registry_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to asset.registry. Business justification: LCRR lead service line inventory and field operations require knowing which asset registry record (meter, service line) is installed at each premise. Premise already carries denormalized meter_size_in

attributes.name: service_address_id
attributes.description: Reference to the postal and Geographic Information System (GIS) address record for this premise. Links premise to distribution network location.

attributes.name: sewershed_basin_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to wastewater.sewershed_basin. Business justification: Capacity planning, SSO regulatory reporting, and wastewater billing require knowing which sewershed basin drains each premise. premise.wastewater_service_available_flag confirms wastewater service con

attributes.name: backflow_prevention_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the premise requires backflow prevention devices due to cross-connection hazards. Mandatory for commercial, industrial, and irrigation services per Safe Drinking Water Act (SDWA).

attributes.name: building_square_footage
attributes.description: Total conditioned floor area of structures on the premise in square feet. Used for commercial water demand forecasting and capacity fee assessments.

attributes.name: building_type
attributes.description: Physical structure classification of the building on the premise. Used for demand forecasting and infrastructure capacity planning. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: detached_house|townhouse|apartment|office|retail|warehouse|manufacturing|school|hospital|government|mixed_use — 11 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: connection_fee_paid_amount
attributes.description: Total one-time connection or capacity fees paid for this premise to establish utility service. Includes system development charges and impact fees.

attributes.name: connection_fee_paid_date
attributes.description: Date when connection or capacity fees were paid for this premise. Used for revenue recognition and capital improvement program (CIP) funding tracking.

attributes.name: construction_year
attributes.description: Year the primary structure on the premise was originally constructed. Used for infrastructure age analysis and lead service line risk assessment per Lead and Copper Rule Revisions (LCRR).

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this premise record was first created in the utility system. Part of audit trail for data lineage and regulatory compliance.

attributes.name: district_metered_area_code
attributes.description: Code identifying the District Metered Area (DMA) for water loss management and Non-Revenue Water (NRW) tracking. Used for hydraulic zone analysis.

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: Date when this premise record was retired or became inactive. Null for currently active premises. Supports temporal data management and historical analysis.

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: Date when this premise record became active and available for service connections. Supports temporal data management and historical analysis.

attributes.name: elevation_feet
attributes.description: Ground elevation of the premise in feet above mean sea level. Critical for hydraulic pressure calculations and gravity sewer flow analysis.

attributes.name: estimated_daily_demand_gallons
attributes.description: Projected average daily water consumption in gallons for this premise based on premise type, units, and historical usage patterns. Used for capacity planning and meter sizing.

attributes.name: fats_oils_grease_program_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: Fats Oils and Grease (FOG) Program Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the premise is subject to Fats, Oils, and Grease (FOG) control program requirements. Applicable to food service establishments to prevent Sanitary Sewer Overflows (SSO).

tag_set.value: Fats Oils and Grease (FOG) Program Flag

attributes.name: fire_protection_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the premise requires dedicated fire protection service (fire hydrant or sprinkler connection). Determines fire service charge applicability.

attributes.name: gis_latitude
attributes.description: Latitude coordinate of the premise location in decimal degrees (WGS84 datum). Used for spatial analysis, hydraulic modeling, and field service dispatch.

attributes.name: gis_longitude
attributes.description: Longitude coordinate of the premise location in decimal degrees (WGS84 datum). Used for spatial analysis, hydraulic modeling, and field service dispatch.

attributes.name: industrial_user_permit_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the premise requires an Industrial User Permit (IUP) for wastewater discharge due to industrial processes. Triggers pretreatment program compliance monitoring.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this premise record was most recently updated. Used for change tracking and data synchronization across systems.

attributes.name: lot_size_square_feet
attributes.description: Total land area of the premise parcel in square feet. Used for irrigation demand estimation and stormwater fee calculations.

attributes.name: low_income_assistance_eligible_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the premise qualifies for low-income customer assistance programs based on property characteristics or census tract designation. Used for rate discount eligibility.

attributes.name: meter_size_inches
attributes.description: Standard meter size in inches required or installed at this premise based on demand characteristics. Common sizes: 0.625, 0.75, 1.0, 1.5, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0, 6.0, 8.0 inches.

attributes.name: number_of_units
attributes.description: Count of individual dwelling or tenant units within the premise. Applicable for multi-family residential and commercial properties. Used for equivalent dwelling unit (EDU) calculations.

attributes.name: parcel_number
attributes.description: County assessor's parcel number (APN) or tax lot identifier for the property. Used for cross-reference with property tax records and GIS systems.

attributes.name: peak_demand_gpm
attributes.description: Estimated peak instantaneous water demand in Gallons Per Minute (GPM) for this premise. Used for hydraulic modeling and service line sizing.

attributes.name: premise_number
attributes.description: Externally-known business identifier for the premise, used in customer communications and field operations. Unique across the utility service territory.

attributes.name: premise_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the premise in the utility's service inventory. Determines whether the premise is available for service connection.

attributes.name: premise_type
attributes.description: Classification of the premise based on its primary use and service characteristics. Determines applicable rate schedules and service requirements.

attributes.name: pressure_zone
attributes.description: Hydraulic pressure zone designation for this premise within the distribution network. Determines operating Pounds per Square Inch (PSI) range and Pressure Reducing Valve (PRV) assignments.

attributes.name: reclaimed_water_service_available_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether recycled or reclaimed water distribution infrastructure is available for non-potable uses such as irrigation. Part of water conservation programs.

attributes.name: service_line_diameter_inches
attributes.description: Internal diameter of the water service line in inches. Determines flow capacity and pressure loss from main to premise.

attributes.name: service_line_material
attributes.description: Material composition of the water service line connecting the distribution main to the premise. Critical for Lead and Copper Rule Revisions (LCRR) compliance and lead service line inventory. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: copper|galvanized_steel|lead|pvc|pex|hdpe|unknown — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: sewer_lateral_diameter_inches
attributes.description: Internal diameter of the sanitary sewer lateral in inches. Determines wastewater conveyance capacity from premise to collection system.

attributes.name: sewer_lateral_material
attributes.description: Material composition of the sanitary sewer lateral connecting the premise to the collection main. Used for Inflow and Infiltration (I&I) risk assessment.

attributes.name: special_notes
attributes.description: Free-text field for operational notes, access instructions, or unique characteristics of the premise relevant to field service personnel and customer service representatives.

attributes.name: stormwater_service_available_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether stormwater drainage infrastructure serves this premise. Determines applicability of stormwater utility fees.

attributes.name: wastewater_service_available_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether sanitary sewer collection infrastructure is available to serve this premise. True if sewer mains are accessible within standard connection distance.

attributes.name: water_service_available_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether potable water distribution infrastructure is available to serve this premise. True if water mains are accessible within standard connection distance.

attributes.name: zoning_classification
attributes.description: Municipal zoning code designation for the premise parcel. Determines permitted land uses and development density. Format varies by jurisdiction.

products.name: service_agreement
products.description: The contractual relationship between a customer account and the utility for a specific service type (potable water, wastewater, recycled water, fire protection, irrigation) at a premise. Captures service agreement number, service type, rate schedule code, start date, end date, deposit amount, deposit waiver reason, service class, budget billing enrollment, and agreement status. This is the SSOT for what service a customer is contracted to receive and at what rate. Distinct from billing invoices (which are transactional) and from the rate schedule (which is a reference entity in the service domain).

products.name: account_person_rel
products.description: Association entity capturing the relationship between a person and a water utility account, including the role the person plays (primary account holder, co-applicant, authorized representative, emergency contact, third-party notification recipient). Carries its own business data: relationship type, effective start date, effective end date, notification preferences for this role, and whether the person has billing authority. Supports scenarios such as landlord-tenant relationships, property managers, and third-party bill payers. Required for LCRR lead service line notification compliance.
products.reference: Oracle CC&B Account-Person Relationship

attributes.name: account_person_rel_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the account-person relationship record. Primary key.

attributes.name: customer_account_id
attributes.description: Reference to the water utility account in this relationship. Links to the service account that the person is associated with.

attributes.name: primary_account_person_id
attributes.description: Reference to the person entity in this relationship. Links to the individual who has a role on the account.

attributes.name: accessibility_requirements
attributes.description: Special accessibility or accommodation needs for this person when communicating about the account. May include requirements for large print, braille, TTY, or other assistive technologies.

attributes.name: authorization_date
attributes.description: The date when this relationship was formally authorized or approved. Used for audit trail and compliance verification.

attributes.name: authorization_document_reference
attributes.description: Reference number or identifier for the legal document or form that authorizes this relationship. May reference a power of attorney, lease agreement, or authorization form.

attributes.name: billing_authority_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this person has authority to make billing decisions, dispute charges, or modify payment arrangements for the account. True if authorized, false otherwise.

attributes.name: ccr_delivery_required_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: Consumer Confidence Report (CCR) Delivery Required Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this person must receive the annual Consumer Confidence Report for water quality as required by the Safe Drinking Water Act. True if delivery is required, false otherwise.

tag_set.value: Consumer Confidence Report (CCR) Delivery Required Flag

attributes.name: created_by_user
attributes.description: The system user ID or username of the person who created this relationship record. Used for audit trail and accountability.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this relationship record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and data lineage tracking.

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: The date when this person-account relationship ended or will end. Null for open-ended relationships. Used for temporal tracking and historical analysis.

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: The date when this person-account relationship became active and legally binding. Used for temporal tracking and compliance reporting.

attributes.name: emergency_contact_priority
attributes.description: The order in which this person should be contacted in case of emergency at the service address. Lower numbers indicate higher priority. Null if not an emergency contact.

attributes.name: financial_responsibility_percentage
attributes.description: The percentage of account charges for which this person is financially responsible. Used in split-billing scenarios or shared responsibility arrangements. Value between 0.00 and 100.00.

attributes.name: landlord_tenant_indicator
attributes.description: Specifies whether this person is the property owner (landlord), renter (tenant), owner-occupant, or property manager. Used for billing responsibility determination and compliance reporting.

attributes.name: language_preference
attributes.description: The preferred language for communications with this person regarding the account. Three-letter ISO 639-2 language code. Used for compliance with language access requirements. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: ENG|SPA|CHI|FRE|VIE|KOR|RUS|ARA|POR|OTH — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: last_modified_by_user
attributes.description: The system user ID or username of the person who last modified this relationship record. Used for audit trail and accountability.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: The date and time when this relationship record was most recently updated. Used for audit trail and change tracking.

attributes.name: lcrr_notification_required_flag
attributes.business_glossary_term: Lead and Copper Rule Revisions (LCRR) Notification Required Flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this person must receive mandatory notifications under the EPA Lead and Copper Rule Revisions regarding lead service lines at the service address. True if notification is required, false otherwise.

tag_set.value: Lead and Copper Rule Revisions (LCRR) Notification Required Flag

attributes.name: notification_preference
attributes.description: The preferred communication channel for sending notifications to this person regarding the account. Used for outage alerts, billing reminders, and compliance notifications.

attributes.name: relationship_notes
attributes.description: Free-form text field for additional information about this account-person relationship. May include special instructions, restrictions, or context relevant to customer service representatives.

attributes.name: relationship_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the account-person relationship. Indicates whether the relationship is currently in effect or has been terminated.

attributes.name: relationship_type
attributes.description: The role or capacity in which the person is associated with the account. Defines the nature of the relationship between the person and the service account.

attributes.name: service_authorization_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this person has authority to request service orders, schedule appointments, or authorize field work for the account. True if authorized, false otherwise.

attributes.name: termination_date
attributes.description: The date when this relationship was formally terminated in the system. May differ from effective_end_date if termination was processed retroactively. Null for active relationships.

attributes.name: termination_reason
attributes.description: The reason why this account-person relationship was terminated. Null for active relationships. Used for analytics and compliance reporting. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: account_closed|person_removed|authorization_revoked|lease_ended|property_sold|death|customer_request|administrative — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: third_party_payer_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether this person is responsible for paying the bill on behalf of the primary account holder. True for third-party payers such as social service agencies or property managers, false otherwise.

attributes.name: verification_date
attributes.description: The date when the person's identity and relationship authorization were last verified. Used for periodic re-verification requirements and audit compliance.

attributes.name: verification_method
attributes.description: The method used to verify the person's identity and authorization for this relationship. Used for audit trail and fraud prevention analysis.

attributes.name: verification_status
attributes.description: Indicates whether the person's identity and authorization for this relationship have been verified. Used for fraud prevention and compliance with customer identification requirements.

products.name: service_application
products.description: Record of a customer's application to establish, transfer, or modify water and/or wastewater service. Captures application number, application type (new service, transfer, upgrade, downgrade, termination), applicant identity, requested service address, requested service start date, application submission channel (online, phone, walk-in), application status (submitted, under review, approved, rejected, withdrawn), identity verification outcome, credit check result, deposit requirement, and processing timestamps. Represents the start of the customer lifecycle. Sourced from Oracle CC&B and Microsoft Dynamics 365.
products.reference: Oracle CC&B Start/Stop/Transfer Order

attributes.name: tap_pipe_main_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to distribution.pipe_main. Business justification: During new service connection approval, engineering must identify the specific pipe main to be tapped. Capacity, material compatibility, and operating pressure of the tap main are reviewed as part of

attributes.name: application_number
attributes.description: Externally-visible unique application number assigned when the customer submits a service application. Used for customer communication and tracking.

attributes.name: application_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the service application: submitted (initial state), under review (being processed by utility staff), approved (ready for service establishment), rejected (application denied), withdrawn (applicant cancelled), or pending payment (awaiting deposit or connection fee).

attributes.name: application_type
attributes.description: Type of service application: new service establishment, transfer of service to new occupant, service upgrade (larger meter or additional service), service downgrade, service termination, or reconnection after disconnection.

attributes.name: approval_date
attributes.description: Date when the service application was approved by the utility, authorizing service establishment.

attributes.name: approval_timestamp
attributes.description: Precise date and time when the service application was approved.

attributes.name: connection_fee_amount
attributes.description: One-time connection or service establishment fee charged to the applicant for initiating water or wastewater service at the premise.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this service application record was first created in the system.

attributes.name: credit_check_result
attributes.description: Outcome of the credit check: pass (credit meets utility standards), fail (credit does not meet standards, deposit required), insufficient history (no credit history available), or not applicable (credit check not performed).

attributes.name: credit_check_status
attributes.description: Status of credit check for the applicant: not required (based on service class or policy), pending (credit check requested), completed (credit check results received), or waived (credit check requirement waived by management).

attributes.name: credit_score
attributes.description: Numeric credit score obtained from credit bureau for the applicant, used to determine deposit requirements and service approval.

attributes.name: deposit_amount
attributes.description: Dollar amount of security deposit required from the applicant before service establishment. Null if no deposit is required.

attributes.name: deposit_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether a security deposit is required from the applicant before service can be established, based on credit check results, service history, or utility policy.

attributes.description: Method used to verify the applicant's identity: drivers license, passport, utility bill from previous address, government-issued ID, credit report, or in-person verification at utility office.

attributes.name: identity_verification_status
attributes.description: Status of applicant identity verification process: not started, pending (documents submitted, under review), verified (identity confirmed), or failed (unable to verify identity).

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time when this service application record was last updated or modified.

attributes.name: meter_size_requested
attributes.description: Size of water meter requested by the applicant or recommended by utility staff based on anticipated usage (e.g., 5/8 inch, 3/4 inch, 1 inch, 1.5 inch, 2 inch, etc.).

attributes.name: priority_level
attributes.description: Priority level assigned to the application for processing: low (standard processing), normal (default priority), high (expedited processing requested), or urgent (emergency service needed).

attributes.name: processing_notes

attributes.name: rejection_date
attributes.description: Date when the service application was rejected by the utility. Null if application was not rejected.

attributes.name: rejection_reason

attributes.name: rejection_reason_code

attributes.name: requested_service_start_date
attributes.description: Date when the applicant requests water or wastewater service to begin at the service address.

attributes.name: review_completed_date
attributes.description: Date when the application review process was completed and a decision (approved or rejected) was made.

attributes.name: review_start_date
attributes.description: Date when utility staff began reviewing and processing the service application.

attributes.name: service_class_requested
attributes.description: Customer segment or service class requested: residential (single-family or multi-family), commercial (retail, office), industrial (manufacturing, processing), municipal (government facilities), agricultural (irrigation, livestock), or institutional (schools, hospitals).

attributes.name: service_type_requested
attributes.description: Type of utility service requested by the applicant: water only, wastewater (sewer) only, or combined water and wastewater service.

attributes.name: sla_due_date
attributes.description: Target date by which the application should be reviewed and processed according to utility service level agreement standards.

attributes.name: submission_channel
attributes.description: Channel through which the customer submitted the service application: online customer portal, phone call to customer service, walk-in at utility office, postal mail, mobile app, or email.

attributes.name: submission_date
attributes.description: Date when the customer submitted the service application.

attributes.name: submission_timestamp
attributes.description: Precise date and time when the service application was submitted by the customer or entered into the system.

attributes.name: withdrawn_date
attributes.description: Date when the applicant withdrew or cancelled the service application. Null if application was not withdrawn.

attributes.name: withdrawn_reason
attributes.description: Reason provided by the applicant for withdrawing the service application (e.g., changed mind, moved to different location, service no longer needed).

products.name: contact
products.description: Master record of all contact points, communication preferences, and third-party notification arrangements associated with a customer account or person. Captures contact type (billing, service, emergency, legal notice, third-party notification), contact value, contact channel (phone/email/SMS/postal/portal), is_primary flag, is_verified flag, verification date, opt-in/opt-out status per communication channel, preferred language, notification trigger type (for third-party arrangements: pre-disconnect, outage, boil-water notice), ADA accommodation flags (large print, braille, TTY), relationship to account holder (for third-party contacts), effective date range, and consent documentation reference. Supports multi-channel customer communications including CCR delivery, boil-water notices, outage notifications, TCPA/CAN-SPAM compliance, EPA CCR electronic delivery rules, and state PUC consumer protection rules for third-party notification before disconnection.
products.reference: Oracle CC&B Contact / MS Dynamics 365 Contact

attributes.name: contact_id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for the contact record. Primary key.

attributes.name: contact_customer_account_id
attributes.description: Reference to the customer account or person this contact is associated with. Links contact to the customer master record in Oracle Utilities CC&B.

attributes.name: contact_customer_customer_account_id
attributes.description: Reference to the customer account or person this contact is associated with. Links contact to the customer master record in Oracle Utilities CC&B.

attributes.name: person_id
attributes.description: Foreign key linking to customer.person. Business justification: Contact points (phone, email) may be associated with specific persons in addition to accounts. This allows tracking which person at an account uses which contact method. Nullable FK as some contacts a

attributes.name: channel
attributes.description: The communication channel or medium through which this contact point operates. Supports multi-channel customer engagement including Consumer Confidence Report (CCR) delivery, boil-water notices, and outage notifications.

attributes.name: contact_status
attributes.description: Current lifecycle status of the contact record. Active contacts are used for communications; inactive contacts are retained for history; invalid contacts have been identified as unreachable; pending_verification contacts await confirmation.

attributes.name: contact_type
attributes.description: Classification of the contact purpose. Indicates whether this contact is used for billing correspondence, service notifications, emergency alerts, legal notices, technical communications, or general customer service inquiries.

attributes.name: created_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this contact record was first created in the data platform. Supports audit trail and data lineage tracking.

attributes.name: delivery_failure_count
attributes.description: Count of failed communication delivery attempts to this contact. Used to identify problematic contacts and trigger validation workflows.

attributes.name: delivery_success_count
attributes.description: Count of successful communication deliveries to this contact. Used to calculate contact reliability and quality scores.

attributes.name: do_not_contact_flag
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating customer has requested no contact through this channel except for legally required communications. Overrides opt-in preferences except for emergency and regulatory notifications.

attributes.name: effective_end_date
attributes.description: Date after which this contact information is no longer active. Null for currently active contacts. Enables contact history tracking and audit trails.

attributes.name: effective_start_date
attributes.description: Date from which this contact information becomes active and valid for use. Supports temporal contact management and future-dated contact changes.

attributes.name: invalid_date
attributes.description: Date when this contact was marked as invalid. Used for data quality reporting and contact refresh prioritization.

attributes.name: invalid_reason
attributes.description: Reason why this contact was marked as invalid. Populated when contact_status is set to invalid. Supports data quality improvement and contact cleansing workflows.

attributes.name: is_primary
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this is the primary contact point for the associated customer and contact type. Used to determine default communication channel for critical notifications.

attributes.name: is_verified
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this contact information has been verified as accurate and reachable. Verification may occur through confirmation emails, SMS codes, or postal mail validation.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Human-readable label or nickname for this contact (e.g., 'Home Phone', 'Work Email', 'Billing Address'). Helps users distinguish between multiple contacts of the same type.

attributes.name: language_preference
attributes.description: Preferred language for communications sent to this contact. Three-letter ISO 639-2 language code. Supports multilingual customer communications and regulatory compliance for non-English speaking customers. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: ENG|SPA|FRE|CHI|VIE|KOR|RUS|ARA|POR|GER — 10 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]

attributes.name: last_contact_date
attributes.description: Date when this contact point was last used for outbound communication. Used to track contact engagement and identify stale contact records.

attributes.name: last_contact_type
attributes.description: Type of the last communication sent to this contact (e.g., bill, service alert, CCR, boil-water notice). Supports communication history analysis.

attributes.name: notes
attributes.description: Free-text notes or comments about this contact record. May include special handling instructions, customer preferences, or historical context.

attributes.name: opt_in_billing
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating customer consent to receive billing-related communications through this contact channel. Supports compliance with communication preference regulations.

attributes.name: opt_in_emergency
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating customer consent to receive emergency alerts (e.g., boil-water notices, water quality advisories, Sanitary Sewer Overflow (SSO) notifications) through this contact channel. Typically defaults to true for critical public health communications.

attributes.name: opt_in_marketing
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating customer consent to receive marketing and promotional communications (e.g., conservation programs, new service offerings) through this contact channel.

attributes.name: opt_in_service
attributes.description: Boolean flag indicating customer consent to receive service-related communications (e.g., planned outages, maintenance notifications) through this contact channel.

attributes.name: opt_out_date
attributes.description: Date when the customer opted out of communications through this contact channel. Null if customer has not opted out. Used for compliance reporting and communication suppression.

attributes.name: opt_out_reason
attributes.description: Free-text reason provided by customer for opting out of communications. Supports customer experience analysis and communication strategy improvement.

attributes.name: quality_score
attributes.description: Data quality score for this contact record (0.00 to 100.00). Calculated based on verification status, recency, completeness, and delivery success rate. Used to prioritize contact data cleansing efforts.

attributes.name: source_system_code
attributes.description: Unique identifier for this contact in the source system. Enables traceability back to the system of record and supports data reconciliation.

attributes.name: time_zone
attributes.description: Time zone associated with this contact location (e.g., America/New_York, America/Los_Angeles). Used to schedule communications at appropriate local times and comply with TCPA calling hour restrictions.

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Timestamp when this contact record was last modified. Supports change tracking and data quality monitoring.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The actual contact information value - phone number, email address, mailing address, SMS number, portal username, or fax number. Format varies by contact_channel. This is the primary contact data point.

attributes.name: verification_date
attributes.description: Date when this contact information was last verified. Used to track data quality and trigger re-verification workflows for stale contact data.

attributes.name: verification_method
attributes.description: Method used to verify this contact information. Tracks how the contact was validated to support audit and data quality reporting.

products.name: complaint
products.description: Formal record of a customer complaint or grievance filed with the utility, including water quality complaints, billing disputes, service interruption complaints, pressure complaints, odor/taste complaints, and regulatory complaints escalated to the state primacy agency or PUC. Captures complaint number, complaint category, complaint description, reported date, assigned resolution owner, target resolution date, actual resolution date, resolution description, regulatory escalation flag, and customer satisfaction outcome. Distinct from customer_interaction (which captures all contacts) — a complaint has its own formal resolution workflow and regulatory reporting obligations. [SSOT: Canonical complaint record; metering.metering_complaint references this as SSOT]

attributes.name: follow_up_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether additional follow-up action or monitoring is required after initial complaint resolution.

attributes.name: internal_notes
attributes.description: Internal notes and comments for staff use, not visible to the customer, documenting investigation steps, coordination with other departments, and operational context.

attributes.name: last_modified_timestamp
attributes.description: System timestamp when the complaint record was last updated.

attributes.name: priority_level
attributes.description: Urgency classification of the complaint based on health and safety risk, regulatory exposure, and customer impact. Critical includes Maximum Contaminant Level (MCL) exceedances and Sanitary Sewer Overflow (SSO) events.

attributes.name: received_date
attributes.description: Attribute received_date for customer_complaint

attributes.name: regulatory_agency
attributes.description: Name of the regulatory agency involved if the complaint was escalated, such as state Department of Environmental Quality, Public Utilities Commission (PUC), or U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA).

attributes.name: regulatory_case_number
attributes.description: Case or reference number assigned by the regulatory agency for tracking the escalated complaint.

attributes.name: regulatory_escalation_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether the complaint was escalated to or originated from a regulatory agency such as state primacy agency, Public Utilities Commission (PUC), or U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA).

attributes.name: regulatory_reportable_flag
attributes.description: Regulatory reportable flag

attributes.name: regulatory_response_due_date
attributes.description: Date by which the utility must provide a formal response to the regulatory agency regarding the escalated complaint.

attributes.name: reported_date
attributes.description: Date when the complaint was first reported to the utility by the customer.

attributes.name: reported_timestamp
attributes.description: Precise date and time when the complaint was logged into the system, including time zone offset.

attributes.name: resolution_code
attributes.description: Resolution code

attributes.name: resolution_date
attributes.description: Resolution date

attributes.name: resolution_description
attributes.description: Detailed narrative of the actions taken to resolve the complaint, including investigation findings, corrective actions, and customer communication.

attributes.name: resolution_notes
attributes.description: Attribute resolution_notes for customer_complaint

attributes.name: resolution_timestamp
attributes.description: Precise date and time when the complaint was marked as resolved, including time zone offset.

attributes.name: resolved_date
attributes.description: Attribute resolved_date for customer_complaint

attributes.name: root_cause
attributes.description: Identified root cause of the complaint issue, such as main break, meter malfunction, billing system error, water treatment process deviation, or customer misunderstanding.

attributes.name: source_channel
attributes.description: Source channel

attributes.name: subcategory
attributes.description: Detailed subcategory providing additional classification granularity within the primary complaint category. Examples: discoloration, chlorine_odor, high_bill, estimated_read, low_pressure, no_water, meter_leak, service_attitude.

attributes.name: target_resolution_date
attributes.description: Target date by which the complaint should be resolved, based on Service Level Agreement (SLA) commitments and regulatory requirements.

attributes.name: updated_timestamp
attributes.description: Record update timestamp

attributes.name: water_quality_related_flag
attributes.description: Water quality related flag

attributes.name: water_quality_test_required_flag
attributes.description: Indicates whether a water quality test was required or performed as part of the complaint investigation, particularly for complaints involving taste, odor, discoloration, or suspected contamination.

domains.name: distribution
domains.description: Owns the potable water distribution network topology, hydraulic modeling, and operational data including mains, service lines, valves, PRVs, hydrants, pump stations, storage tanks, DMAs, and pressure zones. Integrates with Esri ArcGIS and Innovyze InfoWater for network modeling, NRW/UFW analysis, and pressure (PSI) and flow (GPM/MGD) management.
